thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy has provided multiple quotations for Diethyl Phthalate, including CIF and DDP pricing. The customer, Sebastiano, has placed several purchase orders (PO 638, PO 639, and PO 640) which are subject to sample approval, and has amended the POs as requested.
open_items: Elchemy to send Proforma Invoices for POs 638, 639, and 640
Elchemy to confirm the dispatch planning and share further details

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy has been negotiating pricing for Benzaldehyde with the customer, L.R. Flavours & Fragrances Industries. After several exchanges, Elchemy provided a revised price of EUR 1.87/Kg CIF Augusta, which is still higher than the customer's target price of EUR 1.79/Kg. The customer is seeking to finalize the negotiation and send a purchase order.
open_items: Customer needs to confirm if the revised price of EUR 1.87/Kg is acceptable to proceed with the order.
Elchemy is awaiting feedback on the latest pricing offer.

thread_summaries.summary: Apurva Arora from Elchemy informed the customer that they will be out of the office and that their response will be delayed. No specific products or decisions were discussed in this brief exchange.
Apurva Arora from Elchemy informed the customer that they will be out of the office, which may cause a delay in response.

Elchemy is following up on two order opportunities for Benzaldehyde and Diethyl Phthalate with the customer, L.R. Flavours & Fragrances. They have shared revised price offers and are awaiting feedback to proceed further.
open_items: Customer to provide feedback on revised price offers for Benzaldehyde and Diethyl Phthalate

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy followed up with Sebastiano regarding upcoming requirements for various specialty chemicals, including Diethyl Phthalate, Benzaldehyde, and Benzyl Acetate. They expressed readiness to discuss pricing and stock availability for these products.
open_items: Sebastiano to confirm requirements for Diethyl Phthalate, Benzyl Acetate, and Benzaldehyde
Elchemy to share best offer for the mentioned products

thread_summaries.summary: The email thread discusses the shipment of original documents for PO 1231, which is scheduled to be dispatched on March 2, 2026. Michele Spadaro requested the tracking number for the shipment, and Pina Saccone confirmed that the documents are expected to arrive at the Catania branch on March 11, 2026.
open_items: Provide the tracking number for PO 1231

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy is seeking support from L.R. Flavors & Fragrances to act as proposers for their application for membership in the International Federation of Essential Oils and Aroma Trades (IFEAT). The email emphasizes the benefits of membership for improving service and aligning with global industry regulations.
open_items: Awaiting response from L.R. Flavors & Fragrances regarding their willingness to support Elchemy's IFEAT membership application.

thread_summaries.summary: Pina Saccone from L.R. Flavours & Fragrances Industries informed Aditya Agarwal about a bank error and forwarded relevant SWIFT documentation. Aditya acknowledged the email and involved the Accounts Team to address the issue further.
open_items: Accounts Team to follow up with Pina regarding the bank error and SWIFT documentation

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy has reached out to Giovanni regarding the recent India-EU Free Trade Agreement, highlighting the benefits for sourcing aroma and fragrance ingredients. They are eager to discuss how they can support Giovanni's growth in 2026 through reduced costs and improved supply chain transparency.
open_items: Schedule a 15-minute introductory call to discuss opportunities and support for 2026 growth
